assertionResults.fullName: Transaction API POST /api/transactions/deposit should deposit money successfully
assertionResults.title: should deposit money successfully

assertionResults.fullName: Transaction API POST /api/transactions/withdraw should withdraw amount seamlessly when enough cash is available
assertionResults.title: should withdraw amount seamlessly when enough cash is available

assertionResults.fullName: Transaction API POST /api/transactions/withdraw should auto-sell assets when BRL balance is insufficient but total portfolio value is enough
assertionResults.title: should auto-sell assets when BRL balance is insufficient but total portfolio value is enough

assertionResults.fullName: Transaction API POST /api/transactions/withdraw should fail when withdrawal exceeds total portfolio value
assertionResults.title: should fail when withdrawal exceeds total portfolio value

assertionResults.title: should return requires_liquidation: false if sufficient BRL

assertionResults.title: should calculate required liquidation but NOT mutate the database

assertionResults.fullName: Transaction API POST /api/transactions/withdraw/preview should fail preview when withdrawal exceeds total portfolio value
assertionResults.title: should fail preview when withdrawal exceeds total portfolio value
